positive: A stylized, minimalist cosmic forest scene. The central element is a collection of geometrically shaped, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna, rooted in a dark, velvety nebula ground. The trees and leaves should have clean, crisp, graphic silhouettes, resembling highly detailed stained glass or linocut engravings, but with an ethereal glow. Dominant colors are deep indigo, cosmic teal, vibrant lavender, and accents of shimmering gold leaf effect. Use strong, dramatic contrast between the glowing subjects and the deep space background. The composition must be perfectly balanced and suitable for a repeating pattern or a central chest print on apparel. Concept: Abstract Celestial Flora. Aspect Ratio: 1:1. Lighting: Dramatic, deep glow emanating only from the subjects. Style: Modern tattoo flash illustration meets Art Nouveau geometry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, noise, text, watermark, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, gradient sky, photographic, hyperrealism
